import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, textwrap, os, sys, pandas as pd

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json(quran_path)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10]

import re, unicodedata

def normalize(ar):
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    ar = tashkeel.sub('', ar)
    # normalize alef/hamza forms
    ar = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]', 'ا', ar)
    ar = ar.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    ar = ar.replace('ـ','')
    ar = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', ar)
    # collapse spaces
    ar = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', ar).strip()
    return ar

target = "فَأَخَذَهُمُ الْعَذَابُ بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ"
norm_target = normalize(target)
norm_target

# Search for verses containing the normalized target as substring after normalization
matches = []
for v in quran:
    ay = v['ayah_text']
    if norm_target in normalize(ay):
        matches.append(v)
len(matches)

# Try searching by tokens: all tokens in target should appear in verse
target_tokens = set(norm_target.split())
cands = []
for v in quran:
    ay_norm = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
    if target_tokens.issubset(set(ay_norm.split())):
        cands.append((v, ay_norm))
len(cands)

# find verses that end with "بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ" or contain it
phrase = "بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ"
norm_phrase = normalize(phrase)
cands2 = []
for v in quran:
    if norm_phrase in normalize(v['ayah_text']):
        cands2.append(v)
len(cands2), [(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id']) for v in cands2[:20]]

for v in cands2:
    print(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text'])

content.text: {"correction":"وَلَوْ أَنَّ أَهْلَ الْقُرَىٰ آمَنُوا وَاتَّقَوْا لَفَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ بَرَكَاتٍ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَلَـٰكِنْ كَذَّبُوا فَأَخَذْنَاهُمْ بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ"}
